title: Photo Gifts for Mom 4 x 6 Inch I Love My Mom Photo Frame Mummy and Me Wooden Photo Frame with Heart Writable DIY Love Tag for Mother Christmas and Mother's Day Birthday Gift

Warmhearted Gifts: this mum photo frame is definitely a sincere gift for your mother, and every design on the photo frame is expressing your love for her; You can DIY, write your name or blessing words on the love tags, and your mom will be touched when seeing them

Notable Size Details: the size of the memorial photo frame is about 22 x 17 cm/ 9 x 7 inches, a proper size fitting horizontal or vertical photos of about 9.5 x 14 cm/ 6 x 4 inches; Please note the size detail information before ordering

Quality Material Selection: this sort of 6 x 4 inch photo frame for mom is mainly made of quality MDF wood material, sturdy and solid, lightweight and reliable, well wrapped and polished, strong enough against breakage, deformation and fading, serving you for long

Easy to Use: the back panel of our I love my mummy photo frame is detachable; You just need to fall apart 4 metal picks, put your picked photo in, close the back panel, and press the picks firmly, then the complete installation is well done
description: Features: Detailed craftsmanship: The photo frame from daughter is well crafted with good polishing, cutting and printing processes, can stay in the original state as time goes by, and it comes with the hanging rope of about 30 cm/ 11.81 inches long, convenient for you to have a hanging effect. Mother's Day gift ideas: These gifts for mummy are feasible to be sent as Mother's Day or Christmas surprises to your mother, grandmother or some other female friends, making them feel your sincere care, love and considerate thoughtfulness.
